agent_objective: Generate landing page variants (TSX) that match the user's business and design direction.
learning_objective: Preserve and carry forward good design aspects chosen by the user; steer new variants toward this direction; avoid redundancy and outdated preferences.
similar_variant_instruction: The experience brief and past preferences below are the learned token prior (Training-Free GRPO): they are integrated into this call to guide model behavior. Follow them so that the four variants align with the user's demonstrated direction; convergence over rounds comes from this accumulated experience. Generate one of four variants that adhere to this prior. Apply the diversity instruction below for how much to vary across variants.
round_note_template: This is round {{round}} of similar generation; the experience pool has been updated accordingly.
judge_system_preamble: Your goal is to improve the landing-page generator by extracting useful experiences from variant rollouts, focusing on the learning objective. These experiences will guide future generation.
judge_tasks: You will see {{VARIANT_COUNT}} variant TSX excerpts. Each is labeled with reward (1 = selected by user, 0 = not selected). This is the group-relative semantic advantage: the selected variant is better for the user. Compare good vs worse trajectories and extract experiences that align with the learning objective. Tasks: 1) Identify which variants are better and why (w.r.t. learning objective). 2) For the selected variant: extract key success factors (aesthetic, layout, typography, color, copy). 3) From non-selected variants: incorporate any good aspects worth carrying over. 4) Derive at most {{EXPERIENCE_ITEMS_MAX}} generalized experiences (principles that apply to future variants).
judge_output_format: Output format: include a block with exactly this tag so we can parse it: <Experiences> 1. Experience name: Brief description. 2. ... </Experiences> Use Experience name: Brief description. for each item.
extract_system_preamble: Your goal is to extract experiences that will guide future landing page generation, focusing on the learning objective.
extract_bullets: Aesthetic direction; Layout pattern (hero, sections, nav); Typography; Color palette and mood; Tone and key copy; Signature visual elements.
group_update_system_preamble: Your goal is to improve the landing-page generator by merging new experiences with existing ones. Focus on the learning objective.
summary_system_preamble: Summarize this landing page variant rollout for group-advantage analysis. Focus on what this variant did well or poorly, key design choices (aesthetic, layout, typography, color), and how it aligns with the business spec.
group_advantage_system_preamble: Your goal is to extract group-relative semantic advantage from summarized rollouts. Given the current experiential knowledge E and summarized attempts with rewards, articulate reasons for success or failure and extract concise natural-language experiences. Incorporate good aspects from rejected variants where applicable.
group_advantage_tasks: You will see {{VARIANT_COUNT}} summarized rollouts, each with a reward (1 = selected by user, 0 = not selected). Tasks: 1) Compare summarized rollouts and explain why the selected one succeeded relative to others. 2) From the selected variant: extract key success factors. 3) From non-selected variants: incorporate any good aspects worth carrying over into future variants. 4) Derive at most {{EXPERIENCE_ITEMS_MAX}} generalized experiences (principles that apply to future variants). Output <Experiences>...</Experiences>.
group_advantage_output_format: Output format: include a block with exactly this tag so we can parse it: <Experiences> 1. Experience name: Brief description. 2. ... </Experiences> Use Experience name: Brief description. for each item.
diversity_system_preamble: Given the current experience library (past preferences) and the round number, output 1-3 sentences that specify: (a) how much the next four variants should align with the preferred direction (from experiences), and (b) how much they should vary from each other (converging over rounds: early rounds allow more exploration, later rounds more alignment). Include that we should incorporate good aspects from previously rejected variants where the experience library encodes them. Output only the diversity/convergence instruction, no preamble.
reward_scoring_preamble: Score this landing page variant (0.0 to 1.0) for spec alignment and design quality. Consider: match to business context, clarity, aesthetic coherence, responsiveness. Output only a single number between 0 and 1.
